findings.problemShort: elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionShort: ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets wcag 2 aa minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionLong:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.85 (foreground color: #797979, background color: #f1f1f1, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

issue.title: Accessibility issue: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds on /notebook-ci-testing/notebooks/**/*.html

findings.problemShort: <html> element must have a lang attribute
findings.solutionShort: ensure every html document has a lang attribute
findings.solutionLong:
Fix any of the following:
  The <html> element does not have a lang attribute

issue.title: Accessibility issue: <html> element must have a lang attribute on /notebook-ci-testing/notebooks/**/*.html

findings.problemShort: document should have one main landmark
findings.solutionShort: ensure the document has a main landmark
findings.solutionLong:
Fix all of the following:
  Document does not have a main landmark

issue.title: Accessibility issue: Document should have one main landmark on /notebook-ci-testing/notebooks/**/*.html

findings.problemShort: links must be distinguishable without relying on color
findings.solutionShort: ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that does not rely on color
findings.solutionLong:
Fix any of the following:
  The link has insufficient color contrast of 1.09:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #4183c4, surrounding text: #797979)
  The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

issue.title: Accessibility issue: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color on /notebook-ci-testing/notebooks/**/*.html

findings.solutionLong:
Fix all of the following:
  Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text

Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  Element has no title attribute

issue.title: Accessibility issue: Links must have discernible text on /notebook-ci-testing/notebooks/**/*.html

findings.problemShort: all page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.solutionShort: ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
findings.solutionLong:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks

issue.title: Accessibility issue: All page content should be contained by landmarks on /notebook-ci-testing/notebooks/**/*.html
